mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gvrnr_mng_sys_app_transaction ( transaction_id, status, data, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{transactionId} AS UUID), #{status}, CAST(#{data} AS JSONB), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE gvrnr_mng_sys_app_transaction SET status = #{status}, data = CAST(#{data} AS JSONB), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE transaction_id = CAST(#{transactionId} AS UUID)
mapper.select: SELECT transaction_id::text AS transaction_id, status, data::text AS data, created_at::text AS created_at, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM gvrnr_mng_sys_app_transaction WHERE status IN ('pending', 'in_progress') ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT transaction_id::text AS transaction_id, status, data::text AS data, created_at::text AS created_at, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM gvrnr_mng_sys_app_transaction WHERE status IN ('pending', 'in_progress') ORDER BY created_at ASC FOR UPDATE

SELECT transaction_id::text AS transaction_id, status, data::text AS data, created_at::text AS created_at, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM gvrnr_mng_sys_app_transaction WHERE transaction_id = CAST(#{transactionId} AS UUID) FOR UPDATE

SELECT transaction.transaction_id::text AS transaction_id, transaction.status, COALESCE(progress.progress_percent, 0) AS progress_percent, progress.progress_message, transaction.created_at::text AS created_at, transaction.updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM gvrnr_mng_sys_app_transaction transaction LEFT JOIN gvrnr_mng_sys_app_transaction_progress progress ON progress.transaction_id = transaction.transaction_id WHERE transaction.transaction_id = CAST(#{transactionId} AS UUID)

SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gvrnr_mng_sys_app_transaction newer INNER JOIN gvrnr_mng_sys_app_transaction target ON target.transaction_id = CAST(#{transactionId} AS UUID) WHERE newer.status = 'completed' AND newer.transaction_id <> target.transaction_id AND newer.created_at >= target.created_at AND newer.data @> jsonb_build_object( 'items', jsonb_build_array( jsonb_build_object('gvrnr_uid', #{gvrnrUid}) ) ) )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_governor_stat WHERE
( gvrnr_uid = #{item.gvrnrUid} AND record_dttm IN
CAST(#{recordDttm} AS TIMESTAMP)
)
mapper.update:
UPDATE gvrnr_mng_sys_app_transaction SET status = 'rolled_back', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE transaction_id IN
CAST(#{transactionId} AS UUID)
